title: campaigns.contact.opted_out v1
description: Emitted when a contact unsubscribes from campaign communications. Source: alebrije-mod-campaigns-ex (Elixir). external_ref required for correlation with the originating send.

contact_id.description: UUID of the contact who opted out.

campaign_id.description: Campaign that triggered the opt-out, if known.

channel.description: Channel through which opt-out was received (email/sms/whatsapp/...).

reason.description: User-provided or system-inferred reason for opt-out.
